question:
Will the price of Ethereum be above $3,100 on November 17?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

evidences.content: `var request = require('request'); var fs = require('fs') var quote="USDT" var options = { 'method': 'GET', 'url': ' 'headers': { } }; request(options, function (error, response) { if (error) throw new Error(error); //console.log(JSON.parse(response.body)); var symbols = JSON.parse(response.body).symbols var justUSDTpairs = symbols.map((x)=>{ if(x.quoteAsset.includes(quote)){ return x.baseAsset } }).filter((x)=>{if(x){return x}}) fs.writeFileSync('allTargets',JSON.stringify(justUSDTpairs)) });` Arount's user avatar Drun's user avatar ## Comments Add a comment I think this public API can help you. ` Muhammad Safwan's user avatar ## Comments Add a comment For those using the official binance-connector from Binance: [...] `from binance.spot import Spot as Client client = Client() exchange_info = client.exchange_info() usdt = set() for s in exchange_info['symbols']: if s['symbol'].endswith('USDT'): usdt.add(s['symbol']) print(usdt) print(len(usdt))` Gives you a set with all unique Base/USDT pairs. evidences.title: Ethereum (ETH) Price Prediction 2026 2027 2028 - 2040 - Changelly
evidences.content: 2023: A steady recovery. ETH ranged between $1,200 and $2,100 for most of the year, lifted by the April Shapella upgrade enabling staking withdrawals and growing Layer-2 adoption. It closed December near $2,300—up ~91% for the year—as Bitcoin ETF anticipation boosted the whole market. 2024: The institutional gateway opened. The SEC approved spot Ethereum ETFs in May, with trading starting in July. ETH ran to ~$4,000 in March alongside Bitcoin’s post-halving surge, but faded and closed near $3,490. Solid on fundamentals but ETH significantly underperformed Bitcoin’s breakout above $100,000. [...] In 2031, Cryptopolitan forecasts a minimum ETH price of $21,942, an average around $22,545, and a potential high of $25,611, reflecting Ethereum’s increasing appeal to investors and its role as global financial and digital infrastructure. Even more conservative analysts acknowledge that ETH’s trajectory over five years is fundamentally tied to whether it maintains dominance in smart contracts and DeFi. Ethereum is considered a strong long-term investment due to its dominance in smart contracts, staking rewards, and continuous innovation. If that dominance holds, the five-year case is com...

evidences.title: Research │ Crypto & Macro Market Analysis │ BIT
evidences.content: is structurally interesting — buying ETH at 80 cents with a staking yield attached. Sector’s only counter-cyclical accumulator. Catalyst: ETH/BTC stabilizes, ETH ETF outflows end. Metaplanet (narrative reset): mNAV at ~0.90, buyback talk replacing accumulation talk. The per-share BTC growth story doesn’t work at this multiple. Catalyst needed: either formal buyback launch or mNAV recovering above 1.0×. MARA (cheapest among AI-transition comps, latest to convert): Valuation below IREN/CIFR/RIOT makes sense given later pivot. Long Ridge Energy acquisition would be the first concrete signal to track. Bottom Line Warsh chaired his first FOMC and immediately made the crypto market’s life harder. Higher for longer, PCE up to 3.6%, guidance out. Seven consecutive weeks of ETF outflows, the [...] is the more notable: last issue's near-end weakness — where ETH's front-end futures were still in discount and its downside-protection premium elevated — has fully cleared. Front-end basis turned positive, relative strength back to symmetric. The ETH/BTC 30D IV ratio sits at 1.383, still range-bound around the ~1.36 structural pivot, meaning ETH's vol premium over BTC hasn't broken out of its r...

Prices may reflect recent trades, available liquidity, order book activity, and market demand across supported pairs such as ETH/USDT, ETH/USDC, or other available markets. evidences.title: VanEck Crypto Monthly Recap for November 2024
evidences.content: Daily ETH and Major L2s Transactions Reach New Highs Source: Dune @Hilldobby as of 11/27/2024. Past performance is no guarantee of future results. Not intended as a recommendation to buy or sell any securities named herein. ## Justin Drake Releases New Ethereum Roadmap Though it took some time, the Ethereum community finally prodded the “devs to do something” to spur more positive sentiment for ETH. As previously noted, ETH’s price has underperformed in both absolute and relative terms year to date. In November, one of the most important figures in Ethereum, Justin Drake, asserted a concrete vision for Ethereum that includes specific dates for development releases. Called “Beam Chain,” Drake’s vision is a substantial overhaul for Ethereum. Some of the most important features are: [...] ETH (+43%) had a solid month of performance and retraced some of its relative underperformance against BTC (+38%). This performance was catalyzed by a pick-up in on-chain activity and the release of a refined technical roadmap. While Ethereum’s revenues from its execution layer were up (+43%) month to month, reaching $6.4M per day, usage of Ethereum’s “Blobspace” showed even more dramatic progress...

evidences.title: 5 Catalysts Set to Ignite Ethereum's Next Bull Run (Sooner ...
evidences.content: SEC is pro crypto now. And what Black Rockck wants, Black Rockck usually gets. That said, the SEC this week delayed a decision on staking in the Franklin Templeton ETH ETF. So, we're not quite there yet, but that likely means the commission is actually working through the details carefully. Conversations are being had. So, this is definitely one to watch when we get ETH ETF staking. That's probably a catalyst. Now, the next possible catalyst, well, actually, before we get into the next possible catalyst, guys, you want to trade ETH, trade ETH beta coins like Pepe, you just want to trade some Bitcoin, some Salana, whatever you want to trade, you need to be doing that over on Bit Unix. It is the hottest place to be trading crypto coins right now. And it's getting even hotter because not [...] main chain, that's really, really good. That's something people can look forward to. They know it's going to get delivered to the next year. They know it's going to be a big deal for the main chain. That can provide a powerful narrative that turns into a powerful catalyst that sends the price skyrocketing. The next important factor is ETH ETF staking. First off, the ETH ETFs finally, and agai...

evidences.title: Ethereum Price Poised For 200% Rally as ETF Inflows and Bullish Signal Align
evidences.content: Share: AI Overview Ethereum, a major crypto, has rallied more than 5% in 24 hours to about $1,728, extending a near-12% weekly gain as U.S. spot ETH ETFs recorded two straight days of inflows ($14.8M then $29M) with BlackRock leading inflows, signaling renewed institutional interest. Binance saw a one-day surge of over 166,000 ETH withdrawals—interpreted as accumulation or movement into DeFi—and analyst Ali Martinez highlights a rare monthly TD Sequential buy signal pointing to upside targets near $3,000 and $5,000 if support holds. evidences.title: Spot WebSocket Market Streams | Binance Developer Docs
evidences.content: Endpoint Download schema ## Aggregate Trade Streams, t (start time) and T (close time) in the payload are Unix timestamps, which are always interpreted in UTC. WSS {symbol}@kline_{interval}@+08:00 wss://stream.binance.com:9443 Update Speed 1000ms for `1s`, 2000ms for the other intervals ### Kline/Candlestick Streams with timezone offset › Stream parameters Example:1.00 `t` ​integer·int64 Engine timestamp when reference price was valid Example:1770313263917 WSS{symbol}@referencePrice ``` wscat -c wss://stream.binance.com:9443//stream -x '{ "method": "SUBSCRIBE", "params": [ "bazusd@referencePrice" ], "id": "e9d6b4349871b40611412680b3445fac" }' -w 30 ``` Example Request [...] Ask AI about this page Feedback Welcome to the new Binance API documentation.Looking for the previous version?Switch to the legacy docs Image 1: Binance Developer DocsImage 2: Binance Developer Docs Search Ask AI Legacy Docs Language Documentation API Reference SDKs & Tools Agent Native Dev ForumBinance.com Resources Announcements Terms Privacy Support 24/7 Chat Support Support Center Product Feedback Fees Agent Native llms.txt llms-full.txt Agent Native Image 3: Binance Developer DocsImage 4: Binance Develop...
